lockFileMaintenance.description: Refresh Cargo.lock (and other lockfiles) on a schedule so TRANSITIVE crates advance to newer compatible versions. Most of our advisory-ignore entries in deny.toml are unmaintained transitive deps (paste, ttf-parser, proc-macro-error2, quick-xml) that we cannot bump directly; keeping the lock fresh lets them drop out as their framework parents (Slint, winit, image, i18n-embed) migrate away, at which point cargo-deny's `--deny advisory-not-detected` flags the now-stale ignore for removal.

packageRules.description: Supply-chain: only adopt releases that are at least 7 days old
Group Rust crates and the Rust toolchain / cargo tools
Group linters and formatters (overrides ecosystem groups above)
Group all landing site (site/) updates: JS/TS deps, biome and the node/pnpm toolchain (overrides the rust/typescript/lint groups above)
